subject: [PATCH v9 07/15] mm: preserve RWP marker across PTE rewrites

2026-07-06.patch_summary: This patch ensures that the RWP (Read-Only Write-Protection) marker is preserved across PTE rewrites in various kernel paths, including swap, device-exclusive, migration, fork, and mprotect operations. Without this preservation, the RWP tracking could be silently dropped, leading to unexpected behavior when accessing pages protected by userfaultfd. The patch adds checks and modifications to ensure that the uffd bit is preserved in these scenarios, matching the existing handling for VM_UFFD_WP.
